sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try SPACE to see if it does something meaningful
action(['SPACE'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
print("After SPACE:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] > 10 and n['color'] in ['c', 'B', 'Y']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  {n['color']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, bbox=[{min(rows)},{min(cols)}]-[{max(rows)},{max(cols)}]")
print("Board changed?", last_action_result.get('board_changed'))
print("Level completed?", last_action_result.get('level_completed'))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
